questions: Should timeline clip selection and gallery selection be mutually exclusive (selecting in one clears the other) or additive (both contribute to attachments)?
When enableSingleClick is enabled for the GenerationsPane gallery, should double-click still open lightbox, or should there be a separate button/mechanism to view full-size?
Should gallery selection also work in the standalone gallery page (outside the video editor), or only in the GenerationsPane within the editor?
Should the Cmd+click modifier also support Shift+click for range selection (select all items between two clicks), or is individual toggle sufficient for v1?

success_criteria.criterion: Single-click on a gallery item in GenerationsPane selects it with a visible highlight
Cmd+click toggles individual gallery items in/out of multi-selection
Selected gallery items appear in the agent chat 'attaching N images/videos' indicator
Selected gallery items are sent as selected_clips in the agent task submission payload
Gallery selection only allows images and videos (not effects or music)
Existing timeline clip selection continues to work unchanged
Existing useSelectedMediaClips, useItemInteraction, and useMediaGalleryViewInteractions tests pass
Gallery selection clears after a message is sent
Lightbox remains accessible when single-click selection is enabled (via button or double-click)
Selection highlight style is visually consistent with timeline clip selection style
New hook/context files are under ~150 lines each
No new shared component props beyond isSelected and selectedIds
Works on mobile (tap to select, no Cmd+click needed — single tap selects, second tap deselects)

assumptions: Timeline and gallery selections are additive (both contribute to attachments) unless user feedback says otherwise
The onImageClick callback on MediaGalleryItem does not receive the native event — we will use a useModifierKeys hook to track Cmd state rather than modifying the shared component's callback signature
Gallery selection is only needed in the GenerationsPane within the video editor, not the standalone gallery page
Shift+click range selection is out of scope for v1 — only individual toggle via Cmd+click
The enableSingleClick config flag on MediaGallery is the right mechanism to switch click behavior from lightbox to selection
GeneratedImageWithMetadata.type or .isVideo fields are sufficient to determine media type for the SelectedMediaClip shape
